title: LittleQOLBigPerformance
description:
modpack that has little QOL mods, but a lot of performance
the QOL is basically adding more control and support to the performance mods
body:
Modpack that has little QOL mods, but a lot of performance mods.
The QOL is basically adding more control and support to the performance mods.
Mods used are listed in the dependencies in downloads.
Donate to them. I barely did anything but just compile this together for little qol, but big performance
### if you want your mod removed from this, dm me on discord (jecobe)
